title: BEM-840 clear dispatch queue
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='
'
for d in ['governance/workflow_dispatch_queue_disabled','governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-22 | 06:00 (UTC+3)'
qdir=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue')
disabled=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue_disabled')
moved=[]
if qdir.exists():
    for p in sorted(qdir.glob('*.json')):
        target=disabled/(p.name+'.disabled_20260522_0600')
        target.write_text(p.read_text(errors='ignore')+sep+'--- disabled by BEM-840 emergency clear ---'+sep)
        p.unlink()
        moved.append({'from':str(p),'to':str(target)})
# Harden processor: never dispatch codex-runner itself, and allow pause flag.
proc=Path('scripts/process_workflow_dispatch_queue.sh')
if proc.exists():
    proc.write_text('''#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
mkdir -p governance/workflow_dispatch_results governance/state governance/workflow_dispatch_queue_invalid
now="$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)"
printf '{"status":"processor_started","time":"%s"}\n' "$now" > governance/state/workflow_dispatch_queue_processor_marker.json
if [ -f governance/state/workflow_dispatch_queue_paused.flag ]; then
  printf '{"status":"queue_paused","time":"%s"}\n' "$now" > governance/workflow_dispatch_results/queue_paused.status.json
  echo "workflow dispatch queue paused"
  exit 0
fi
count=0
for f in governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/*.json; do
  [ -f "$f" ] || continue
  count=$((count+1))
  base="$(basename "$f" .json)"
  out="governance/workflow_dispatch_results/${base}.status.json"
  if ! python3 -m json.tool "$f" >/tmp/queue_item.json 2>/tmp/queue_item.err; then
    cp "$f" "governance/workflow_dispatch_queue_invalid/${base}.bad.json" || true
    err="$(cat /tmp/queue_item.err | tr '\n' ' ' | sed 's/"/'"'"'/g')"
    printf '{"status":"invalid_json","queue_file":"%s","error":"%s","time":"%s"}\n' "$f" "$err" "$now" > "$out"
    rm -f "$f"
    continue
  fi
  workflow="$(python3 -c 'import json,sys; d=json.load(open(sys.argv[1])); print(d.get("workflow") or d.get("workflow_id") or d.get("file") or "")' "$f")"
  ref="$(python3 -c 'import json,sys; d=json.load(open(sys.argv[1])); print(d.get("ref") or "main")' "$f")"
  if [ -z "$workflow" ]; then
    printf '{"status":"missing_workflow","queue_file":"%s","time":"%s"}\n' "$f" "$now" > "$out"
    rm -f "$f"
    continue
  fi
  if [ "$workflow" = "codex-runner.yml" ] || [ "$workflow" = "CODEX-RUNNER" ] || [ "$workflow" = "Codex Runner" ]; then
    printf '{"status":"self_dispatch_forbidden","queue_file":"%s","workflow":"%s","time":"%s"}\n' "$f" "$workflow" "$now" > "$out"
    rm -f "$f"
    continue
  fi
  if [ -z "${GH_TOKEN:-}" ]; then
    printf '{"status":"token_missing","queue_file":"%s","workflow":"%s","ref":"%s","time":"%s"}\n' "$f" "$workflow" "$ref" "$now" > "$out"
    continue
  fi
  if gh workflow run "$workflow" --ref "$ref"; then
    printf '{"status":"dispatch_attempted","exit_code":0,"queue_file":"%s","workflow":"%s","ref":"%s","time":"%s"}\n' "$f" "$workflow" "$ref" "$now" > "$out"
    rm -f "$f"
  else
    code=$?
    printf '{"status":"dispatch_failed","exit_code":%s,"queue_file":"%s","workflow":"%s","ref":"%s","time":"%s"}\n' "$code" "$f" "$workflow" "$ref" "$now" > "$out"
  fi
done
echo "processed_queue_items=$count"
''')
# Pause queue until operator-independent blocker is removed deliberately.
Path('governance/state/workflow_dispatch_queue_paused.flag').write_text('BEM-840 emergency pause | 2026-05-22 | 06:00 UTC+3'+sep)
state={'bem':'BEM-840','status':'dispatch_queue_cleared_and_paused','moved_queue_files':moved,'self_dispatch_forbidden':True,'pause_flag':'governance/state/workflow_dispatch_queue_paused.flag','blocker':{'code':'MANUAL_BLOCK_REMOVED_QUEUE_PAUSED','message':'Queue items were cleared/disabled to stop recursive or stuck dispatch. Next inspect active GitHub Actions outside queue loop, then unpause only with one validated Claude dispatch item.'},'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem840_emergency_clear_dispatch_queue.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem840_emergency_clear_dispatch_queue.md').write_text('# BEM-840 | Emergency Clear Dispatch Queue | '+state['status']+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem840_next.md').write_text('Next: inspect active long-running GitHub Actions/run blocker and only then unpause queue with one validated Claude dispatch item. Operator relay forbidden.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-840'+sep+sep+'Dispatch queue cleared and paused. Self-dispatch forbidden. Next: inspect active long-running run blocker, not add more queued tasks.'+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem840_emergency_clear_dispatch_queue.json','governance/reports/bem840_emergency_clear_dispatch_queue.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem840_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl','governance/state/workflow_dispatch_queue_paused.flag']
if proc.exists(): changed.append(str(proc))
for item in moved: changed.append(item['to'])
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Emergency cleared dispatch queue, disabled queued items, paused queue processor, and forbade codex-runner self-dispatch to remove the manual block instead of adding more tasks')
"""
No issue comments.
